title: auricula lutea
intro: Auricula lutea, also known as the yellow primrose or yellow primuline, is a type of flowering plant native to Europe, known for its bright yellow flowers and fragrant foliage. The medicinal properties of Auricula lutea include its ability to act as a sedative and antispasmodic, making it useful for treating anxiety and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Auricula lutea include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve sleep quality, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat fever and coughs. Auricula lutea can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
